reasoning: The icon is placed on a noticeably bright beige/cream square tile that creates extreme contrast against the surrounding dark teal game grid. While this makes the position locatable in under 0.5s, the readability credit belongs to the jarring background tile rather than the icon itself. The icon (small green/yellow pixel art gem) is visually noisy and undersized within the tile. The beige background does not match any other UI element in the scene and clashes severely with the Echoes dark-teal color palette — it reads as a placeholder tile or foreign asset, not a native UI element. No outline blending issue, but the integration failure is fundamental: the tile background is the dominant visual, not the icon glyph. Tonal clash and non-native feel prevent a passing score.
